title: Ubiquiti UVC-G4-PRO - UniFi Video Camera G4 Professional
description: The G4-PRO is our most powerful camera yet, with a large 1/1.8" sensor, 3X powered optical zoom lens, and integrated high-power infrared LEDs for night vision. The adjustable base can be mounted to a flat surface or a pole The wide-aperture lens, oversized image sensor, and high-power LEDs deliver exceptional clarity and low-light performance UniFi Protect Controller is a powerful integrated IP video surveillance platform designed to work with UniFi Protect cameras and the UniFi Protect app The G4 Pro Camera offers aiming flexibility and can be mounted quickly on a wall, ceiling, or pole Device Pole mount bracket Screws + anchors
specsSearch: Camera WDR Digital Lens type Varifocal - motorized Lens [mm] 4,24 to 12,66 (adjustable) Illumination IR Viewing Angle [°] 108 Day/night mode IR cut filter Image sensor ["] 1/1.8 Image Resolution 8MP Max. resolution [pixels] 3840 x 2160 (4K UHD) Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 12,5 Physical characteristics Protection class IP67 Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 50 Weight [g] 700 Width [mm] 86 Height [mm] 86 Depth [mm] 153 Color White Compression standard Video compression H.264 General Camera class UniFi Protect
